commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh My praise shall be of you in the great congregation: I will pay my vows before them that fear him. Augustine of Hippo 26. "With Thee is My praise" (ver. For I seek not Mine own praise, for Thou art My praise, who dwellest in the holy place; and, praise of Israel, Thou hearest The Holy One now beseeching Thee. "In the great Church I will confess Thee. " In the Church of the whole world" I will confess Thee. " "I will offer My vows in the sight of them that fear Him. " I will offer the sacraments of My Body and Blood in the sight of them that fear Him.
